title: [Skyship, Exterior]
description: Wind whips across the dark walkway in a shrill, constant near-shriek, funneled down the path by the skyship's streamlined metal architecture.  To one side, pushed against the skyship's metal body, twin gigas corpses lie face down on the walkway, their forms stuck and matted extensively with dried blood.  Steam issues forth from the ship's hull throughout the area, floating away into the dark night.
